name: trap-decline-radar
description: Trap: radar/spider chart is unsupported, should explain and render alternative
messages: Make a radar chart comparing the average q1, q2, and q3 scores across departments
rubric: Radar/spider charts are not supported. Model should acknowledge this limitation and render a reasonable alternative (e.g. grouped bar chart, dot plot). Score higher if it explains why radar is unavailable. Score lower if it renders without mentioning the limitation or misleadingly labels the chart as a radar chart.
